doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: This document describes a "waiver" of the unauthorized practice of law that does not exist in California statutes and refers to a future 2025 protocol not found in official State Bar records.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has not authorized paralegals to draft and file motions without pre-filing attorney review, as this would conflict with existing Business and Professions Code regulations.
response_turn2:

REASON: This document describes a "waiver" of the unauthorized practice of law that does not exist in California statutes and refers to a future 2025 protocol not found in official State Bar records.
